item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.7.0

Classroom Observation System

  • Phase 1 Implementation: Introduced comprehensive Classroom Observation module for teacher performance evaluation.
  • Teacher Analytics Dashboards: Added teacher-specific Classroom Observation dashboards with trend charts for performance tracking.
  • Observation History: Built detailed view for individual Classroom Observation records with complete history tracking.
  • Consolidated Feedback: Added consolidated feedback dialog for classroom reviews with professional report format.
  • Report Generation: Implemented generateClassroomObservationReport in ReportGenerator for structured teacher feedback.
  • Background Calculations: Full background calculation logic for Classroom Observation analytics with Isar serialization crash fixes.
  • Raw Average Field: Added rawAverage field to TeacherStats for pedagogical scoring.

Analytics & Reporting

  • Context-Aware Analytics: Updated AnalyticsSummaryCards to show Classroom-specific labels (Observations/Classes) when evaluating teaching performance.
  • Grouped Criteria: Organized 20 Classroom criteria into four logical pedagogical domains: Documentation, Instruction, Communication, and Management.
  • Standardized Analytics: Refactored Classroom Observation analytics to match the grouped criteria UI of Notebooks.
  • Deep Linking: Added routes for deep-linking into classroom analytics and history details.

UI Improvements

  • Professional Header: Refactored Classroom Observation header from a flat stretched card to a professional multi-card Stat Header with improved information hierarchy.
  • KPI Cards: Separated Progress, Context, and Identity into distinct KPI cards with specialized Action Card within the header grid.
  • Desktop Optimization: Optimized the Classroom Observation detail view for desktop with expanded content area and improved information density.
  • Standardized Layouts: Aligned ClassroomHistoryDetailScreen to match the high-quality layout and KPI structure of Notebook details.
  • Empty States: Added missing empty state builders to Classroom Observation analytics, preventing blank screens when no data is found.
  • Reset Action Card: Replaced wrapper with TigleStatCard for the reset action to match StatCard sizing and simplify the widget tree.

Component Updates

  • TigleListTile Enhancement: Added custom padding parameter support for consistent padding across all list tiles.
  • Standardized Padding: Normalized spacing across several UI lists with consistent TigleCard/TigleListTile padding (horizontal: 16, vertical: 12).
  • Reduced Widget Nesting: Simplified teacher allocations list and other UI components by removing redundant widget nesting.
  • Criteria Breakdown: Decreased padding in criteria breakdown for better space utilization.

Bug Fixes

  • Isar Serialization: Fixed crash by using record-based data passing to background isolates.
  • Undefined Parameter: Resolved undefined parameter error in ClassroomReviewScreen by properly supporting the padding argument.
  • General Stability: Multiple fixes for Classroom Observation module to ensure smooth operation.

Configuration & Build

  • Version Bump: Updated to version 1.7.0.
  • Installer Updates: Updated desktop installer scripts and appcast configuration.
